interpretation.main_result: B-stretch gives clean local rho and local Tkk relief, but traversal/null-path sampling and proper integrated negative Tkk show that the support debt is mainly spread over a longer affine/proper interval rather than removed.
interpretation.transition_result: Broad smooth B shoulders avoid large derivative pathologies; narrow or high-p profiles move stress into transition shoulders and produce derivative spikes.
interpretation.next_gate: A credible quantum/source model must support a long, weak radial null-contracted stress distribution. Timelike-sampled Tkk and integrated null-burden diagnostics are the next source-level tests.
